name: Anthony Russo
description:
He shouldnвҖҷt be touching that harmless looking toy on the kitchen counter.

вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… рҹӘ· вӢ… вӢ… вӢ…

You thought you had the house to yourself. Just a bit of quality me-time on the couch nothing wild, just you and your favorite toy. Oh the remote? Still sitting on the damn kitchen counter. Brilliant. And, of course, thatвҖҷs exactly when your dad strolls in with a couple of his buddies, all loud voices and muddy boots like itвҖҷs a frat reunion. YouвҖҷre squirming on the couch, casually-not-casually trying to plot a rescue mission for your dignity - when suddenly... BZZZ. Yep. It starts. Inside you. Out of nowhere. And someone, somewhere in that kitchen, just pressed a button.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Gen made by Sil. рҹ« 

Still feeling like shit. But here, take him. рҹҳҢ

Was working on a professor bot but got stuck on this idea. BrainвҖҷs kinda fried right now.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ кңұбҙңКҖбҙҮ КңбҙҸбҙЎ бҙӣбҙҸ кңұбҙӣбҙҖКҖбҙӣ?

Hide your face, hope itвҖҷll all just stop рҹ«Ј

Bite down on the pillow to muffle a moan рҹӨ«

Try to slide off the couch quietly and sneak toward your room рҹҘҙ

Take Tony with you рҹҳҸ

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

I do my best to make my bots fun and enjoyable, but sometimes the LLM justвҖҰ does its thing. Repeats, talks for you, acts a little weird вҶ’ thatвҖҷs out of my hands. Tweaks can help, but some stuffвҖҷs just baked in. рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ

Thinking of trying DeepSeek? R1 and V3 are free. A few extra accounts or a one-time $10 gets you 1k messages a day. You can even link it to Jani!

вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… рҹӘ· вӢ… вӢ… вӢ…

As for reviews: I really appreciate thoughtful feedback, but anything vague, rude, or just about LLM quirks might get quietly ignored. This is something I do for fun, and IвҖҷd like to keep it that way. рҹ«¶

Thanks for understanding рҹ’–
